category.scope_note: China-to-Argentina (IRAM / S-mark) requirements for power tools covering electrical safety, EMC, noise, radio, substance and battery touchpoints, plus importer and clearance routing.

title.en: China-to-Argentina Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入阿根廷：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入阿根廷：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Argentina IRAM / S-mark requirements for electrical safety, EMC-radio, importer routing, noise handling, and battery/material controls versus China GB / GB/T practice.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具与阿根廷 IRAM / S标志、进口清关与技术门槛、噪声管理及电池材料要求与中国 GB/GB/T 的对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具與阿根廷 IRAM / S標誌、進口清關與技術門檻、噪聲管理及電池材料要求與中國 GB / GB/T 的對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Argentina legal requirements and enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验最新阿根廷法规范畴和执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗最新阿根廷法規與執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made cordless or corded power tools, Argentina entry normally centers on a destination product-owner model through a CUIT-holding importer, with S-mark/IRAM electrical-safety expectations, ENACOM review for intentional radio, and market-specific evidence for battery and noise contexts; it does not have a single EU-style mandatory RoHS, battery-regime, or outdoor-noise-marking framework.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入阿根廷通常以在地进口商（CUIT）主导的目的地路径为核心，关注 S标志/IRAM电气安全要求、无线设备的ENACOM渠道，以及电池与噪声情境的市场化证据；该市场未设置欧盟式统一的 RoHS、电池法或户外噪声标识横向门槛。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無線電動工具進入阿根廷通常以在地進口商（CUIT）主導的目的地流程為核心，關注 S 標誌/IRAM 電氣安全要求、無線設備的 ENACOM 審核，以及電池與噪音情境的市場化證據；該市場未設置歐盟式統一的 RoHS、電池法或戶外噪聲標識橫向門檻。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Re-run source checks every quarter and update mandatory_status and official-link evidence after any IRAM, ENACOM, SRT, AFIP, electricity, customs, or labour-law updates.
